2026-03-03PMODepartment of Foreign Affairs, Trade and Development ActAppointment of the Associate Deputy Minister of Foreign AffairsAppointment of David Angell of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Associate Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Foreign Affairs, Trade and Development Act
subject: Appointment of the Associate Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs
precis: Appointment of David Angell of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Associate Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
